title: Peek-a-Boo Seasons with Isla
synopsis: Follow Isla as she plays peek-a-boo through the changing seasons, discovering spring flowers, summer butterflies, autumn leaves, and winter snow in her garden.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, Isla! Where are you hiding?

illustration.description: A little girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes hiding behind a big oak tree in spring, with pink cherry blossoms and green grass around her, rendered in soft spring pastels
illustration.alt: Isla hiding behind a tree in spring

pages.text: There you are! Spring flowers are blooming!

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes peeking out from behind the oak tree surrounded by colorful tulips, daffodils, and cherry blossoms in soft spring pastels
illustration.alt: Isla appearing from behind tree with spring flowers

illustration.description: The same scene with Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes hiding behind the now leafy oak tree, with bright yellow sunflowers and orange butterflies in vibrant summer colors
illustration.alt: Isla hiding behind tree in summer

pages.text: Hello, Isla! Look at the pretty butterflies!

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes stepping out from behind the tree with butterflies flying around her and bright summer flowers in vivid blues, yellows, and oranges

pages.text: Where did you go? Autumn leaves are falling!

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes hiding behind the oak tree with golden, orange, and red autumn leaves falling around her in warm autumn colors
illustration.alt: Isla hiding behind tree in autumn

pages.text: Found you! The leaves are so colorful!

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes playing in a pile of autumn leaves beneath the oak tree, surrounded by warm oranges, reds, and golds

pages.text: Peek-a-boo in the snow! Winter is here!

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes hiding behind the snow-covered oak tree with white snow falling and the ground covered in winter white, rendered in cool winter blues and whites
illustration.alt: Isla hiding behind snowy tree in winter

pages.text: There you are, Isla! All seasons are beautiful!

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes standing by the oak tree with the four seasons shown as quarters around her - spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, and winter cool all in one magical scene
illustration.alt: Isla with all four seasons together

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What season has colorful falling leaves?
questions.explanation: Autumn is when leaves change colors and fall from trees!

questions.question: When do flowers bloom and butterflies fly?
questions.explanation: Spring and summer are when flowers bloom and butterflies are active!

questions.question: What falls from the sky in winter?
questions.explanation: Snow falls from the sky during winter when it's cold!
